message:
refactor(runtime): Consolidate PyValue switch to single source of truth

- Update int_convert.zig to use PyValue.intErrorMessage() instead of
  duplicating the switch statement (deletes ~30 lines of duplicated code)
- Add VM-specific types to repr.zig valueStr() to match valueRepr()

This prevents the recurring issue where adding new PyValue variants
breaks 10+ files with exhaustive switch statements. Now:
- typeName() in object.zig is the single source for type names
- intErrorMessage() in object.zig is the single source for int error msgs
- repr() in object.zig is the single source for repr strings

Tests passing: longexp, int_literal (6/6), unary (5/6), bool (36/38)
